name: AI Marketing Suite
description: An AI-powered marketing tool integrating 15 distinct marketing skills through parallel subagents to audit websites, generate marketing copy, email sequences, ad campaigns, content calendars, competitive intelligence, and prepare client-ready PDF reports.

inputs.name: website_url
inputs.description: URL of the website to be audited or analyzed.

inputs.name: marketing_brief
inputs.description: Description or brief containing the marketing objectives and context.

inputs.name: target_audience
inputs.description: Description of the intended audience for campaigns and content.

inputs.name: email_campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Details such as sequence length, tone, target segment for generating email sequences.

inputs.name: ad_campaign_parameters
inputs.description: Information related to ad goals, platforms, budget, and creative preferences.

inputs.name: content_calendar_requirements
inputs.description: Timeline and frequency details for scheduling content calendars.

inputs.name: competitor_info
inputs.description: Data or URLs about competitors for competitive intelligence.

outputs.name: website_audit_report
outputs.description: Comprehensive audit report of the provided website including marketing insights.

outputs.name: marketing_copy
outputs.description: Generated marketing copy tailored to the provided brief and audience.

outputs.name: email_sequences
outputs.description: Complete sequences of marketing emails for campaigns.

outputs.name: ad_campaign_plan
outputs.description: Structured ad campaign concepts and plans.

outputs.name: content_calendar
outputs.description: Scheduled plan for marketing content dissemination.

outputs.name: competitive_intelligence_report
outputs.description: Analytical report on competitor strategies and positioning.

outputs.name: client_ready_pdf_report
outputs.description: Formatted and polished PDF report ready for client presentation.

patterns: Use of parallel subagents for multi-skill marketing tasks
Automated website auditing combined with marketing insight generation
Template-driven generation of marketing content and campaigns
Structured content calendar creation based on marketing timelines
Consolidation of various marketing outputs into client-ready reports
steps: Input the website URL and marketing brief into the system.
Run parallel subagents to audit the website and generate marketing assets like copy, email sequences, and ad campaigns.
Aggregate findings and content calendar into comprehensive marketing deliverables.
Perform competitive intelligence analysis using competitor input.
Compile outputs into a cohesive client-ready PDF report.
Deliver final reports and assets to the user for implementation.
use_cases: Marketing teams auditing client websites to create tailored marketing strategies.
Agencies generating complete multi-channel marketing campaigns quickly.
Content strategists building marketing calendars aligned with business goals.
Competitive analysts researching market positioning and intelligence.
Sales teams preparing professional marketing collateral for client presentations.

prompt_templates.name: website_audit
prompt_templates.template: Perform a detailed marketing audit on the website at {website_url}.

prompt_templates.name: copy_generation
prompt_templates.template: Generate marketing copy for a product targeting {target_audience} based on this brief: {marketing_brief}.

prompt_templates.name: email_sequence
prompt_templates.template: Create an email marketing sequence with {sequence_length} emails, tone set to {tone}, targeting {target_audience}.

prompt_templates.name: ad_campaign
prompt_templates.template: Design an ad campaign targeting {target_audience} with a budget of {budget} for platforms {platforms}.

prompt_templates.name: content_calendar
prompt_templates.template: Generate a content calendar for the next {time_period} with {frequency} scheduled posts.

prompt_templates.name: competitive_analysis
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the competitors: {competitor_info} and produce competitive intelligence.

prompt_templates.name: client_report
prompt_templates.template: Compile all generated marketing assets and insights into a client-ready PDF report.
